# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-cache-service
  namespace: performance-critical
  labels:
    app: low-latency-cache-service
    tier: caching
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-cache-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-cache-service
        tier: caching
        mesh-bypass: "true"
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: redis-cache
          image: redis:7.2-alpine
          ports:
            - containerPort: 6379
              name: redis
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 1Gi
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 6379
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 6379
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: low-latency-cache-service
  namespace: performance-critical
  labels:
    app: low-latency-cache-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: low-latency-cache-service
  ports:
    - port: 6379
      targetPort: 6379
      name: redis
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-access-dns-service
  namespace: performance-critical
  labels:
    app: direct-access-dns-service
    tier: networking
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-access-dns-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-access-dns-service
        tier: networking
        mesh-bypass: "true"
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: coredns
          image: coredns/coredns:1.11.1
          ports:
            - containerPort: 53
              name: dns-udp
              protocol: UDP
            - containerPort: 53
              name: dns-tcp
              protocol: TCP
          args:
            - "-conf"
            - "/etc/coredns/Corefile"
          volumeMounts:
            - name: config-volume
              mountPath: /etc/coredns
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 53
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 53
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
      volumes:
        - name: config-volume
          configMap:
            name: coredns-config
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: direct-access-dns-service
  namespace: performance-critical
  labels:
    app: direct-access-dns-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: direct-access-dns-service
  ports:
    - port: 53
      targetPort: 53
      name: dns-udp
      protocol: UDP
    - port: 53
      targetPort: 53
      name: dns-tcp
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: high-throughput-data-ingestion
  namespace: performance-critical
  labels:
    app: high-throughput-data-ingestion
    tier: data-pipeline
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 4
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: high-throughput-data-ingestion
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: high-throughput-data-ingestion
        tier: data-pipeline
        mesh-bypass: "true"
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: data-ingestion
          image: confluentinc/cp-kafka:7.5.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9092
              name: kafka
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 9093
              name: kafka-internal
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: KAFKA_LISTENER_SECURITY_PROTOCOL_MAP
              value: "PLAINTEXT:PLAINTEXT,INTERNAL:PLAINTEXT"
            - name: KAFKA_INTER_BROKER_LISTENER_NAME
              value: "INTERNAL"
            - name: KAFKA_LOG_RETENTION_HOURS
              value: "168"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 2Gi
            limits:
              cpu: "2"
              memory: 4Gi
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 9092
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 9092
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 20
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: high-throughput-data-ingestion
  namespace: performance-critical
  labels:
    app: high-throughput-data-ingestion
spec:
  selector:
    app: high-throughput-data-ingestion
  ports:
    - port: 9092
      targetPort: 9092
      name: kafka
      protocol: TCP
    - port: 9093
      targetPort: 9093
      name: kafka-internal
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: realtime-metrics-collector
  namespace: performance-critical
  labels:
    app: realtime-metrics-collector
    tier: observability
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: realtime-metrics-collector
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: realtime-metrics-collector
        tier: observability
        mesh-bypass: "true"
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: prometheus
          image: prom/prometheus:v2.47.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: http-metrics
              protocol: TCP
          args:
            - "--config.file=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml"
            - "--storage.tsdb.path=/prometheus"
            - "--storage.tsdb.retention.time=15d"
          volumeMounts:
            - name: prometheus-config
              mountPath: /etc/prometheus
            - name: prometheus-storage
              mountPath: /prometheus
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 1Gi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 2Gi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /-/ready
              port: 9090
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /-/healthy
              port: 9090
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 15
      volumes:
        - name: prometheus-config
          configMap:
            name: prometheus-config
        - name: prometheus-storage
          emptyDir: {}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: realtime-metrics-collector
  namespace: performance-critical
  labels:
    app: realtime-metrics-collector
spec:
  selector:
    app: realtime-metrics-collector
  ports:
    - port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
      name: http-metrics
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: udp-streaming-service
  namespace: performance-critical
  labels:
    app: udp-streaming-service
    tier: streaming
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: udp-streaming-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: udp-streaming-service
        tier: streaming
        mesh-bypass: "true"
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: streaming-app
          image: nginx:1.25-alpine
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 4000
              name: udp-stream
              protocol: UDP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: udp-streaming-service
  namespace: performance-critical
  labels:
    app: udp-streaming-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: udp-streaming-service
  ports:
    - port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
    - port: 4000
      targetPort: 4000
      name: udp-stream
      protocol: UDP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: performance-critical
  labels:
    istio-injection: enabled
    purpose: low-latency-services
